text: Context Engineering is deciding what information reaches the LLM.
Reranking improves the quality of selected context.
Long contexts can degrade model performance.
Irrelevant chunks should be filtered out before reaching the model.
Preserving document order can sometimes be more important than score.
Chunking strategy affects retrieval quality significantly.
Metadata filtering helps reduce noise in retrieved results.
Some high-scoring chunks may still be irrelevant to the query.
Context window size is a hard constraint in most LLMs.
Diversity in retrieved chunks can improve answer quality.
